steps.expected: Page loads from separate static files
steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'ypricemagic API', all UI elements rendered

steps.action: Check network requests for static assets

steps.expected: Chain selector, Single Token Price, Batch Token Pricing, Token Classification sections visible
steps.observed: All sections rendered correctly with form elements

steps.expected: Price result displayed with chain, token, block, price, cached, block timestamp
steps.observed: Price Result displayed: chain=ethereum, token=<DAI_TOKEN_ADDRESS>, block=24574738, block_timestamp=1772514467, price=1, cached=no
Input type changed from 'text' to 'datetime-local', hint text changed to 'Pick a date/time. Clear to switch back to block number.'

steps.expected: Input switches back to text for block number
steps.observed: Input type reverted to 'text', hint text restored to 'Block number, or type "/" for a date picker. Defaults to latest block.'

evidence.jsEval: document.getElementById('price-block').type returned 'datetime-local' after typing '/', then 'text' after clearing

steps.expected: Form pre-filled with chain=Arbitrum, token=<ARBITRUM_USDT_ADDRESS>, block=12345
steps.observed: Chain selector shows Arbitrum, token address field contains <ARBITRUM_USDT_ADDRESS>, block field contains 12345

evidence.network: N/A (pre-fill is client-side from URL params)

steps.expected: Error message displayed in result area, not raw 400 page
steps.observed: Error message 'Invalid token address: 0xINVALID' displayed in styled error container within the page

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: 400 Bad Request (expected for invalid token)

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. VAL-STATIC-001 (static files served at /static/js/app.js and /static/css/style.css with 200), VAL-STATIC-002 (all 4 chains selectable and retained), VAL-STATIC-003 (single price form returns correct result from /ethereum/price), VAL-STATIC-006 (date picker toggle via '/' and 'Clear' works correctly), VAL-STATIC-007 (URL params pre-fill chain/token/block), VAL-STATIC-009 (invalid token shows styled error message, not raw error page).
